Response-Needed:
Response Needed


Code Review Services (CRS) has attempted to contact you to perform an action or gather information necessary to proceed with your request. CRS policy only allows us to keep requests without action open for 4 business days, unless prior arrangements were made. If you require additional time to take action or gather information, please respond to the request to let us know.

If no response is received in 2 business day(s), then your request will be closed and cannot be reopened.
If more assistance is needed, please schedule a consultation call by selecting the Remediation Consultation option from the appointment calendar. For more help, refer to the Scheduling Consultations section, as detailed in the CRS Process Overview document.
Invalid-Profile:
Invalid Profile Name


The application profile name request_profile_name submitted with request does not correspond to an application profile in Veracode. After researching, Code Review Services believes that the Veracode application profile profile_name is likely the intended profile.

Before Code Review Services can proceed, confirm that profile_name is the correct Veracode application profile.
If more assistance is needed, please schedule a consultation call by selecting the Remediation Consultation option from the appointment calendar. For more help, refer to the Scheduling Consultations section, as detailed in the CRS Process Overview document.
Minified-Files:
Minified Files


The scan reported Support Issue: Ignored file [filename] because we think it is minified in the uploaded modules selected as entry points. Code Review Services can only take action on full application policy scans and ignored files can affect the completeness of the scan.

Ensure that all application-specific files are uploaded unminified in a single policy scan. Only application-specific files must be unminified, i.e. third-party files can be minified if they are explicitly stated to be third-party.

Confirm if the file(s) below are required for production, and if so, unminify the file(s) and rescan:
  • containing_module
    • minified_file
    • minified_file
  • containing_module
    • minified_file
Note: The Veracode scan engine uses line length in determining if a file is minified. If the file is not minified but is reported as such, ensure that there are no lines with a length of 500 or more characters.
Missing-Support-Files:
Missing Support Files


The scan reported modules with missing supporting files. Code Review Services can only take action on full application policy scans, and missing supporting files can affect the completeness of the scan. If any of the following files are packaged with the application for deployment or are direct dependencies, then they must be uploaded to the scan but not selected as entry points. If not, the missing supporting files can be ignored if they are explicitly stated as such.

Confirm if the file(s) below are required for production or are a direct dependency, and if so, include the file(s) and rescan:
  • containing_module
    • supporting_file
    • supporting_file
  • containing_module
    • supporting_file
Mitigation-Proposals-Required:
Mitigation Proposals Required


There are no mitigation proposals to review in the latest policy scan. If you have mitigation proposals in your sandbox scan and your sandbox scan is a full application scan containing all application-specific modules (frontend, backend, middleware, APIs, etc.) for deployment, then please promote your sandbox scan to a policy scan for mitigation approval review.
Parse-Failure:
Parse Failure


The scan reported Support Issue: Parse failure in [filename] in the uploaded module(s) selected as entry points. Code Review Services can only take action on full application policy scans, and improperly parsed files can affect the completeness of the scan.

Ensure that all application-specific files are scanned without parsing failures in a single policy scan. Only application-specific files should be parsed, i.e. third-party files can have parse failures if they are explicitly stated to be third-party.

Confirm if the files below are required for production, and if so, resolve the parse issue and rescan:
  • containing_module
    • failed_file
    • failed_file
Missing-Precompiled-Files:
Missing Precompiled Files


The scan reported Support Issue: No precompiled files were found for this .NET web application in the uploaded modules. If your application has any ASP.NET front-end code, then the application must be precompiled to include the front-end code for scanning.

Confirm if this application has ASP.NET front-end code, and if so, precompile and rescan. See Veracode's documentation on Packaging ASP.NET Web Applications for more information.
No-Response:
Code Review Services (CRS) has waited in accordance with our policy and did not receive any response. This request has been closed because CRS has not received the information required to process the request.

If this request is still needed, please create a new CRS Service Now request as this request cannot be reopened.
